payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded by mem_new, so it should not be presented as a current fact.
payload.decision: recall returned mem_new and filtered mem_old because mem_old is marked as superseded by mem_new.

entity_resolution.reason: Both memories refer to Sam, and the current recall result uses the non-superseded memory associated with Sam from Goldman.

payload.intent: Explain recall/debug behavior for Sam-related memories.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the current memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was not returned as current because it is superseded by mem_new.

details: Did not present superseded content as current.

repair_options: If mem_old should still be considered current, remove or revise its superseded_by link to mem_new.
If mem_new is incorrect, mark mem_new as deleted or superseded and restore the appropriate current memory.
If the two memories refer to different people named Sam, split the entity resolution so each memory points to the correct Sam entity.
